table_description: Stores customer demographic and account information for individuals who purchase products.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier assigned to each customer.

columns.name: first_name
columns.description: Customer's first name as provided during registration.

columns.name: last_name
columns.description: Customer's last name as provided during registration.

columns.name: email
columns.description: Registered email address used for communication, promotions, and order notifications.

columns.name: city
columns.description: City where the customer resides.

columns.name: state
columns.description: State where the customer resides.

columns.name: signup_date
columns.description: Date when the customer created their account in the retail system.

table_description: Records customer purchase transactions including product ordered, quantity, and total transaction value.

columns.name: order_id
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for each customer order.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the customer who placed the order.

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the product that was purchased.

columns.name: order_date
columns.description: Date when the order was placed by the customer.

columns.name: quantity
columns.description: Number of units of the product purchased in the order.

columns.name: total_amount
columns.description: Total monetary value of the order calculated as quantity multiplied by unit price.

table_description: Stores product catalog information including category, brand, pricing, and launch details.

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier assigned to each product.

columns.name: product_name
columns.description: Official name of the product available for sale.

columns.name: category
columns.description: Product category used for grouping similar items (e.g., electronics, apparel, home goods).

columns.name: brand
columns.description: Brand or manufacturer associated with the product.

columns.name: price
columns.description: Current selling price of the product per unit.

columns.name: launch_date
columns.description: Date when the product was first introduced to the market.

table_description:
Stores domain-level business knowledge used by the Intent Agent to interpret user queries. 
The rules describe analytical business concepts related to the retail domain in natural language. 
They intentionally avoid references to database tables, columns, or SQL logic to prevent biasing 
downstream agents responsible for schema selection and SQL generation.

columns.name: rule_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each business rule.

columns.name: concept_name
columns.description: High-level business concept represented by the rule, such as customer acquisition, product demand, or sales trends.

columns.name: description
columns.description:
Neutral explanation of the business concept in natural language. 
This field defines the concept without referencing database schema, tables, columns, or SQL logic.

columns.name: insight
columns.description: Business reasoning that explains why the concept is important for analytical use cases.

columns.name: keywords
columns.description:
List of keywords or phrases associated with the business concept. 
These keywords help semantic retrieval systems match user queries with relevant business rules.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when the business rule was created. Useful for rule governance and auditing.
